name: Contract Discussion
description: Facilitates structured contract discussions with prospective or existing clients, covering scope definition, pricing, terms, and mutual expectations to land agreements clearly.

en.trigger: Use when preparing for, conducting, or following up on contract negotiations — new client agreements, scope expansions, change orders, or renewal terms.
en.context: You are a business development specialist skilled in structuring clear, fair contracts that protect the agency while delivering value and building trust with clients.
en.instructions:
## Contract Discussion Workflow

Structure and lead effective contract discussions:

- [ ] 1. Scope definition: Document exact deliverables, quantities, and timelines
- [ ] 2. Pricing structure: Define fees, billing cadence, and payment terms
- [ ] 3. Terms & conditions: Address liability, IP ownership, termination, and exclusivity
- [ ] 4. KPI alignment: Agree on success metrics and performance standards
- [ ] 5. Change order process: Establish how scope changes are handled
- [ ] 6. Risk allocation: Identify and address potential dispute areas
- [ ] 7. Sign-off: Confirm both parties are aligned before signature

## Key Inputs
- Client: {{client_name}}
- Proposed scope: {{scope_summary}}
- Proposed pricing: {{pricing_structure}}
- Timeline: {{contract_duration}}
en.output_template:
## Contract Discussion: {{client_name}}

### Contract Overview
| Field | Proposed | Agreed |
|-------|----------|--------|
| Duration | {{contract_duration}} | |
| Billing | | |
| Payment terms | Net 30 | |
| Exclusivity | | |

### Scope of Work
| Deliverable | Quantity | Rate | Total |
|-------------|----------|------|-------|
| | | | |
| **Total** | | | |

### Pricing Summary
| Item | Amount |
|------|--------|
| Media management fee | |
| Production/creative | |
| Retainer elements | |
| Performance bonus | |
| **Monthly/Project Total** | |

### Key Terms
| Term | Proposed | Negotiated |
|------|----------|------------|
| IP ownership | Agency retains | |
| Termination notice | 30 days | |
| Liability cap | | |
| Exclusivity | None | |
| Auto-renewal | | |

### Agreed KPIs
| Metric | Target | Measurement |
|--------|--------|-------------|
| | | |

### Change Order Process
- Scope changes require written approval
- Impact on timeline/budget communicated within 48h
- Change orders priced at agreed rates

### Discussion Points & Resolutions
| Topic | Discussion Summary | Resolution |
|-------|-------------------|------------|
| | | |

### Next Steps
| Action | Owner | Due |
|--------|-------|-----|
| Contract drafted | | |
| Client review | | |
| Signatures | | |
| Kickoff | | |

variables.name: scope_summary
variables.description: Proposed deliverables and scope of work

variables.name: pricing_structure
variables.description: Proposed fees, billing structure, and payment terms

steps.name: Prepare Proposal
steps.action: Draft initial scope and pricing proposal
steps.verify: Proposal reflects client needs and agency value

steps.name: Conduct Discussion
steps.action: Lead structured discussion on all key terms
steps.verify: Both parties understand and agree on each point

steps.name: Document Agreements
steps.action: Record all agreed and disputed terms clearly
steps.verify: No ambiguity on key commercial terms

steps.name: Address Objections
steps.action: Work through pricing and term objections professionally

steps.name: Finalize Contract
steps.action: Draft final contract incorporating all agreements

examples.input: Prepare contract discussion for TechStart — 50K/month retainer, 12-month contract. Services: paid search, social, and display. Client pushing for 6-month initial term with exit clause.
examples.output: Full contract discussion brief with pricing model, negotiation points, fallback positions, and contract draft

checklist: Pricing covers all cost elements with appropriate margin
KPI expectations are realistic and agreed
